title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should focus on understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance rather than coding alone, since AI agents can now generate infrastructure code. The best approach is using AI to move faster while validating output against core engineering principles.
